tools.name: agent.getAgentConfiguration
tools.description:
For use by AWS Ground Station Agent and shouldn't be called directly.

Gets the latest configuration information for a registered agent.

tools.name: agent.registerAgent
tools.description:
For use by AWS Ground Station Agent and shouldn't be called directly.

Registers a new agent with AWS Ground Station.

tools.name: agent.updateAgentStatus
tools.description:
For use by AWS Ground Station Agent and shouldn't be called directly.

Update the status of the agent.

tools.name: config.createConfig
tools.description:
Creates a Config with the specified configData parameters.

Only one type of configData can be specified.

tools.name: config.deleteConfig
tools.description: Deletes a Config.

tools.name: config.getConfig
tools.description:
Returns Config information.

Only one Config response can be returned.

tools.name: config.listConfigs
tools.description: Returns a list of Config objects.

tools.name: config.updateConfig
tools.description:
Updates the Config used when scheduling contacts.

Updating a Config will not update the execution parameters for existing future contacts scheduled with this Config.

tools.name: contact.cancelContact
tools.description: Cancels a contact with a specified contact ID.

tools.name: contact.describeContact
tools.description: Describes an existing contact.

tools.name: contact.reserveContact
tools.description: Reserves a contact using specified parameters.

tools.name: contacts.listContacts
tools.description:
Returns a list of contacts.

If statusList contains AVAILABLE, the request must include groundStation, missionprofileArn, and satelliteArn.

tools.name: dataflowEndpointGroup.createDataflowEndpointGroup
tools.description:
Creates a DataflowEndpoint group containing the specified list of DataflowEndpoint objects.

The name field in each endpoint is used in your mission profile DataflowEndpointConfig to specify which endpoints to use during a contact.

When a contact uses multiple DataflowEndpointConfig objects, each Config must match a DataflowEndpoint in the same group.

tools.name: dataflowEndpointGroup.deleteDataflowEndpointGroup
tools.description: Deletes a dataflow endpoint group.

tools.name: dataflowEndpointGroup.getDataflowEndpointGroup
tools.description: Returns the dataflow endpoint group.

tools.name: dataflowEndpointGroup.listDataflowEndpointGroups
tools.description: Returns a list of DataflowEndpoint groups.

tools.name: ephemerides.listEphemerides
tools.description: List existing ephemerides.

tools.name: ephemeris.createEphemeris
tools.description: Creates an Ephemeris with the specified EphemerisData.

tools.name: ephemeris.deleteEphemeris
tools.description: Deletes an ephemeris

tools.name: ephemeris.describeEphemeris
tools.description: Describes an existing ephemeris.

tools.name: ephemeris.updateEphemeris
tools.description: Updates an existing ephemeris

tools.name: groundstation.listGroundStations
tools.description: Returns a list of ground stations.

tools.name: minuteUsage.getMinuteUsage
tools.description: Returns the number of minutes used by account.

tools.name: missionprofile.createMissionProfile
tools.description:
Creates a mission profile.

dataflowEdges is a list of lists of strings. Each lower level list of strings has two elements: a from ARN and a to ARN.

tools.name: missionprofile.deleteMissionProfile
tools.description: Deletes a mission profile.

tools.name: missionprofile.getMissionProfile
tools.description: Returns a mission profile.

tools.name: missionprofile.listMissionProfiles
tools.description: Returns a list of mission profiles.

tools.name: missionprofile.updateMissionProfile
tools.description:
Updates a mission profile.

Updating a mission profile will not update the execution parameters for existing future contacts.

tools.name: satellite.getSatellite
tools.description: Returns a satellite.

tools.name: satellite.listSatellites
tools.description: Returns a list of satellites.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Returns a list of tags for a specified resource.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Assigns a tag to a resource.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Deassigns a resource tag.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
